svg.text: Client can reuse SHM; Rust enqueues to LIFO VecDeque
s2n-quic bidir stream, BBR + TLS, BW-limited
Read from QUIC, write to SHM
ACK after reading request from SHM
Response path — detections back to vehicle
Signal QUIC server: response in SHM
Same QUIC bidir stream, reverse direction
Read from QUIC, write to SHM
ZMQ REP "ACK" — Rust can reuse quic_rcv_shm
Each SHM handoff: writer → SHM → ZMQ signal(len) → reader memcpy/pickle.loads → ZMQ ACK
